rationale: Cycle 7 bug hunt found no CRITICAL/HIGH issues. Feature cycle: Enhanced encounter card overlay with CRT/PSX cinematic presentation. Found HIGH bug during review: minigame.start() was never called in encounter flow — minigames created but never started. Fixed. Also fixed LOW bug: set_color_levels used wrong shader parameter in PSX mode.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt on cycle 8 files (encounter_card_overlay.gd). Then: Ogham activation UI during card encounters, or core loop playtest simulation.
